programme.desc: 2025/2026. From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: EP27: GARY NEVILLE: PREMIER LEAGUE HALL OF FAME. We sit down for an exclusive interview with the second of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Gary Neville. From his journey from Class of ’92 prodigy to Premier League Hall of Fame icon.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: EP01: LEE BOWYER. We sit down with Lee Bowyer to look back on the career of one of the Premier League’s fiercest and most competitive midfielders. From his rise at Charlton to becoming a key figure in the brilliant Leeds United side that challenged Europe.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: EP52: THE GREAT NORTH LONDON DIVIDE. Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, id.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS
programme.desc: EP10: PATRICK VIEIRA. Patrick Vieira revisits the defining moments of his legendary Premier League career, counting down the 10 greatest memories from his time in England. From fierce rivalries and title triumphs to unforgettable performances in midfield,.

programme.title: PL GOATS
programme.desc: EP02: ITALIAN STARS WITH GIANFRANCO ZOLA. Italy has provided some of the greatest players to ever grace the Premier League. This week, we sit down with two Italian legends, Roberto Di Matteo and Gianfranco Zola to discuss the indelible mark of Italian pla.

programme.title: REVIEW
